name: Spatial puzzle
description: Spatial puzzle is a type of game or challenge that tests a player’s ability to visualize, manipulate, and reason about objects in space. These puzzles often require you to think beyond flat, two-dimensional logic and instead engage with shapes, patterns, and structures in three dimensions. Players must mentally rotate, arrange, or transform pieces to achieve a specific goal, such as fitting objects together, navigating a path, or reconstructing a shape.
instructions: Mouse Touch Input Click or tap on puzzle pieces to select them Drag to move pieces across the board Release to place them in position
